title: Tools, Device Commands, PBQs, and Certification Capstone · Incident Case: Net Discovery Speed Tools
summary: Use software, hardware, discovery, capture, and device evidence to design, implement, secure, operate, and repair a branch network. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net discovery speed tools increment in a performance-based branch network capstone. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use LLDP or CDP and speed tests while accounting for device support, advertisement trust, test path, server, and competing load.
Use protocol analyzers and authorized Nmap discovery or service probes with scope, timing, vantage, and false-result awareness.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

# comptia-network-plus safe operations evidence notebook

# Add one observation, command, expected signal, and conclusion per activity.
